introSection: SpaceChaser was a steel roller coaster built by Dutch manufacturer J. Bakker Denies previously owned and travelled by UK showman Kyle Beach. The coaster was scrapped in 2022.

sections.title: History
sections.content: The coaster travelled with Dutch showman Piet Stroucken in the 1970s under the name Alpen Express.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The SpaceChaser used drive tyres to propel the train backwards and forwards through a figure-eight shaped layout.

fullText:
SpaceChaser was a steel roller coaster built by Dutch manufacturer J. Bakker Denies previously owned and travelled by UK showman Kyle Beach. The coaster was scrapped in 2022.

The coaster travelled with Dutch showman Piet Stroucken in the 1970s under the name Alpen Express.

The SpaceChaser used drive tyres to propel the train backwards and forwards through a figure-eight shaped layout.




 * Space Chaser - The Adventure Island Guide
 * Photos of SpaceChaser
 * SpaceChaser while travelling
